chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-768 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection at flag-A 2. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2025 Petitioner Roshan Ali Lakhan is present in person. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General. Mr. Gulzar Ali Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General along with DSP Liaquat Jiskani, Head Quarter Hyderabad, ASI Ghulam Rasool on behalf of SSP Ghoki and SSP Sukkur, Inspector Manzoor Hussain on behalf of SSP Hyderabad..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The statements/ reports have been filed by respondents No.6, 7, 9 and 10, same are taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the petitioner. The respondents, in their statement, have denied the allegations leveled against them and further stated that they are ready to provide protection to the petitioner and his family members. On such statements, petitioner satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition. Under the circumstances instant petition is disposed of, with directions to the official respondents to provide protection the petitioner and his family member as per law. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
